name: Whimsical Wonders
description:
Lyney can have 2 Grin-Malkin Hats present at once.
Additionally, Prop Arrows will summon 2 Grin-Malkin Hats and grant Lyney 1 extra stack of Prop Surplus. This effect can occur once every 15s.

name: Loquacious Cajoling
description: When Lyney is on the field, he will gain a stack of Crisp Focus every 2s. Each stack will increase his CRIT DMG by 20%. Max 3 stacks. This effect will be canceled when Lyney leaves the field.

name: Prestidigitation
description:
Increases the Level of Normal Attack: Card Force Translocation by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.

name: Well-Versed, Well-Rehearsed
description: After an opponent is hit by Lyney's Pyro Charged Attack, this opponent's Pyro RES will be decreased by 20% for 6s.

name: To Pierce Enigmas
description:
Increases the Level of Wondrous Trick: Miracle Parade by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.

name: Guarded Smile
description: When Lyney fires a Prop Arrow, he will fire a Pyrotechnic Strike: Reprised that will deal 80% of a Pyrotechnic Strike's DMG. This DMG is considered Charged Attack DMG.
